$comment: All durable harness state, owned by the CLI (./AGENTS.sh) — never hand-edit. Keys: setup (present only while guided setup is pending; init drives it), commands (via `cmd set/rm`; verify = definition-of-done step, init = session-start check), features (via `feature ...`; max one in_progress, never delete — mark done), progress (via `log`; append-only, display bounded by the CLI), rules (via `docs add/rm`; curated project knowledge). Future harness versions may add top-level keys. Transient scratch lives in agents.scratch.json (gitignored).

check.run: python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 cad/violin.py && python3 mesh/mesher.py && python3 sim_struct/structural.py && python3 sim_acoustic/acoustic.py

features.title: Complete guided project setup
features.notes: Driven by ./AGENTS.sh init (SETUP MODE); closes itself when setup finalizes.

progress.title: Added a neck to the Violin CAD model
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py to include neck parameters and geometry, adding neck_length, neck_width, and neck_height and unioning the neck with the violin body.

progress.title: Added a bridge to the Violin CAD model
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py to include bridge parameters and geometry, and unioned the bridge with the violin body

progress.title: Added a soundpost to the CAD model
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py to add soundpost geometry with radius and offsets. Updated opt/optimize.py to run with parameters

progress.title: Added a bass bar to the CAD model
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py to add bass bar geometry with length, width, height, and offsets. Updated opt/optimize.py to run with parameters

progress.title: Added top, back, and rib thickness parameters
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py to use independent thickness parameters for the top plate, back plate, and ribs.

progress.title: maintenance: docs cleanup
progress.done: Removed bad cite artifacts from deep-research-report.md

progress.title: Added parametric arching to violin body
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py with domed structures, ribs, and re-aligned all components. Added arch_height and rib_height parameters to CLI.

progress.title: Added top_arch_height, back_arch_height, and rib_height to optimization script
progress.done: Updated opt/optimize.py to include top_arch_height, back_arch_height, and rib_height as hyperparameters during optimization and final generation.

progress.title: Added neck and bridge parameters to optimization
progress.done: Updated opt/optimize.py to include neck and bridge hyperparameters.

progress.title: Optimize mass and volume
progress.done: Updated opt/optimize.py to extract volume from violin_body.json and include it in fitness.

progress.title: Add f_hole_width parameter to optimization
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py to parameterize and optimize f-hole width.

progress.title: Add parameter for purfling groove depth
progress.done: Added purfling_groove_depth parameter to CAD generator and optimizer.

progress.title: Add a fingerboard to the violin CAD model and optimization pipeline
progress.done: Added fingerboard parameters to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py. Fingerboard implemented as trapezoid.

progress.title: Add a pegbox and pegs to the violin CAD model and optimization pipeline
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py with pegbox and peg variables.

progress.title: Add an endpin to the violin CAD model and optimization pipeline
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py with endpin parameters.

progress.title: Add a saddle to the violin CAD model and optimization pipeline
progress.done: Added saddle parameters and geometry to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py

progress.title: Add a scroll to the violin CAD model and optimization pipeline
progress.done: Added scroll radius and width parameters and cylinder geometry to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py. Verified pipeline builds successfully.

progress.title: Add bridge curvature parameter
progress.done: Added bridge radius parameter and modified the bridge generation in cad/violin.py to have a curved top surface. Passed the new parameter in opt/optimize.py

progress.title: Add bridge feet parameters and geometry to CAD model
progress.done: Added bridge_foot_length and bridge_foot_height parameters to cad/violin.py, implemented cutout in the bridge base, and updated opt/optimize.py to include these new parameters.

progress.title: Add soundholes (f-holes) custom profiles parameter to CAD model
progress.done: Added f_hole_profile, f_hole_top_radius, and f_hole_bottom_radius arguments to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py. Support classic and slot modes.

progress.title: Add curved fingerboard parameter to CAD model
progress.done: Added fingerboard_radius parameter to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py. Updated CAD logic to use a cylinder to intersect with the fingerboard to give it a curved top surface.

progress.title: Add parametric fine tuners to tailpiece
progress.done: Added fine_tuner_radius and fine_tuner_height parameters to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py. Updated CAD logic to generate 4 fine tuners on the tailpiece.

progress.title: Parametric chin rest ergonomics
progress.done: Made chin rest cutouts parametric

progress.title: maintenance: cleanup leftovers and verify
progress.done: Removed test_chinrest.py and verified pipeline

progress.title: maintenance: add data and profiles directories, update gitignore and agents docs
progress.done: added missing dirs and updated docs rule R-003

progress.title: Added a C-bout cutout parameter to the violin CAD model and optimization pipeline.
progress.done: Integrated c_bout_cutout_radius parameter into CAD generator to smoothly indent the violin body waist. Included in optuna search space.

progress.title: Parametric sound holes (f-holes)
progress.done: Added f_hole_y_offset and f_hole_angle parameters to CAD model and optimization pipeline.

progress.title: Add bridge curvature parameters
progress.done: Added bridge_inner_curve_radius and bridge_side_cutout_radius to CAD model and optimization pipeline.

progress.title: Calculate bridge mass and volume
progress.done: Modified create_violin_body to extract bridge component, calculated its mass/volume, and exported them to violin_body.json.

progress.title: Implemented pegbox angle parameter
progress.done: Added pegbox_angle to CAD model and optimization pipeline to allow tilting the pegbox backward relative to the neck.

progress.title: Add bridge_cutouts parameter
progress.done: Added bridge_cutouts toggle to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py

progress.title: Add bridge width top and bottom parameters [F-061]
progress.done: Added bridge_width_top and bridge_width_bottom parameters to replace bridge_width. Replaced base block with a trapezoidal extrusion. Updated optimize.py to match.

progress.title: Add bridge foot width parameter [F-063]
progress.done: Added bridge_foot_width parameter to allow varying the width of the feet in the Y direction.

progress.title: Add bass_bar_angle parameter
progress.done: Added bass_bar_angle parameter to allow tuning the bass bar rotation angle. Exposed the parameter to the CAD CLI and optimization pipeline.

progress.title: Verified top and bottom block optimization parameters
progress.done: Verified that top_block_width, top_block_length, bottom_block_width, and bottom_block_length are correctly extracted and passed to CadQuery within optimize.py

progress.title: Added bridge_y_offset parameter
progress.done: Added bridge_y_offset to cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py. Verified end-to-end functionality.

progress.title: Added bridge central cutout boolean flag
progress.done: Added boolean flag bridge_central_cutout to toggle central cutout generation in cad/violin.py and opt/optimize.py. Verified locally.

progress.title: Switched slicer from Bambu Studio to Orca Slicer
progress.done: Updated slice/slicer.py to wrap orca-slicer CLI instead of bambu-studio. Also updated opt/optimize.py, README.md, AGENTS.md, and project docs to reflect the switch to Orca Slicer CLI.

progress.title: Extract slicing pipeline to support orca-slicer configuration overrides and proper working directories
progress.done: Updated slice/slicer.py to use an isolated temp directory, extract output.gcode.3mf, and pass machine, process, and filament profiles to orca-slicer

progress.title: Add progress tracking to Orca Slicer wrapper using named pipes
progress.done: Updated slice/slicer.py to use a named pipe and thread for streaming orca-slicer JSON progress to logs

progress.title: Add parameterized neck width
progress.done: Updated cad/violin.py to use neck_width_top and neck_width_bottom for a trapezoidal neck. Updated common/params.py to track these new variables.

rules.text: Pipeline: cad -> slice -> sim_struct/sim_acoustic -> opt. Data flows through these stages.
Python ecosystem: use CadQuery, Optuna, Bambu CLI.
Verify the pipeline runs end-to-end correctly by running all modules
Python ecosystem: use CadQuery, Optuna, Orca Slicer CLI.
